summary:
Issues Found
- UFC dashboard (ufc-dashboard#14): the scraper marks empty-payload events as fresh — two events carry the SHA-256 of an empty string yet are counted in the 100% success rate, so the dashboard shows them green while they hold no data. Filed.
- Volleyball: read OK but all-zero activity (0 frames, 0 footage, last_footage_at=null, no errors). This is IDLE, not healthy — we can't tell if the pipeline ran with no footage or didn't run at all. Flagged as a monitoring gap.

Top Enhancement Ideas (ranked)
1. Volleyball — Emit last_run_at separate from last_footage_at (effort: low, impact: high): makes idleness detectable instead of silently passing.
2. Overseer — Shared IDLE classification + run-freshness in the read tools, with regression tests (effort: low, impact: high): stops a skipped weekly run from reading as healthy.
3. Crypto bot — Report a 30d/90d window beside 7d and grey out low-sample win rates (effort: low, impact: medium): stops 1–2 trade weeks reading as flawless.
4. UFC dashboard — Persist odds snapshots and compute line-movement deltas (effort: medium, impact: medium): turns the scraper into an actual odds tracker, its stated purpose.

Volleyball.reason: read OK but no recent activity / stale data

timeline.label: reasoning
timeline.text: Investigating all four projects (including the overseer itself) for confirmed bugs only — no enhancements.

timeline.label: reasoning
timeline.text: UFC: two events carry the SHA-256 of an empty string but count toward a 100% success rate — a real silent extraction failure. Checking for an existing issue before filing.

timeline.label: file_issue (bug)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/ufc-dashboard — Scraper marks empty-payload events as "fresh" — silent extraction failure (SHA-256 of empty string) (#14)

timeline.label: reasoning
timeline.text: Now brainstorming enhancements across all four projects — ignoring what's broken, spreading ideas so no single project hogs them.

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/volleyball — Emit last_run_at separate from last_footage_at to distinguish "idle" from "pipeline not running" (effort low, impact high)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/overseer — Shared IDLE classification + run-freshness in read tools, with regression tests (effort low, impact high)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/crypto-trading — Report a 30d/90d window alongside 7d and grey out low-sample win rates (effort low, impact medium)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/ufc-dashboard — Persist odds snapshots and compute line-movement deltas over time (effort medium, impact medium)

timeline.label: reasoning
timeline.text: Merging the Bug-Hunter and Idea reports from their text only — deduping overlap, ranking ideas low-effort/high-impact first, and writing the two-section digest.
